item.title: Lunch Meeting with Tino
item.description: Catching up with Tino over lunch while on the job. A glimpse into workday conversations and team camaraderie.

media:content.media:title: Lunch Meeting with Tino
media:content.media:description: Catching up with Tino over lunch while on the job. A glimpse into workday conversations and team camaraderie.

item.title: Early Morning Concrete Roasting
item.description: Ray gets the roasting started bright and early on the job site. A peek at teamwork and morning routine on the concrete crew.

media:content.media:title: Early Morning Concrete Roasting
media:content.media:description: Ray gets the roasting started bright and early on the job site. A peek at teamwork and morning routine on the concrete crew.

item.title: Skid Loader vs. Semi
item.description: A skid loader gets stuck while working near a semi truck. A tricky construction moment with unexpected challenges.

media:content.media:title: Skid Loader vs. Semi
media:content.media:description: A skid loader gets stuck while working near a semi truck. A tricky construction moment with unexpected challenges.

item.title: Darryl Takes the RV Wheel
item.description: Watch the hilarious moments as Darryl navigates the RV on a road trip. Funny adventures and unexpected twists along the way.

media:content.media:title: Darryl Takes the RV Wheel
media:content.media:description: Watch the hilarious moments as Darryl navigates the RV on a road trip. Funny adventures and unexpected twists along the way.

item.title: Annie’s Mischief Caught on Camera
item.description: Watch Annie the cat explore, play, and get into mischief. A playful and funny moment for cat lovers.

media:content.media:title: Annie’s Mischief Caught on Camera
media:content.media:description: Watch Annie the cat explore, play, and get into mischief. A playful and funny moment for cat lovers.

item.title: Throwback Skills in Action
item.description: Revisiting a long-forgotten skill with fun and nostalgia. Watch the magic unfold after years of practice.

media:content.media:title: Throwback Skills in Action
media:content.media:description: Revisiting a long-forgotten skill with fun and nostalgia. Watch the magic unfold after years of practice.

item.title: Snowplow to the Rescue
item.description: After getting stuck in heavy snow, the plow comes through to save the day. A look at teamwork and quick thinking during a challenging winter storm.

media:content.media:title: Snowplow to the Rescue
media:content.media:description: After getting stuck in heavy snow, the plow comes through to save the day. A look at teamwork and quick thinking during a challenging winter storm.

item.title: Hidden Wire Found Under Concrete
item.description: A surprise electrical wire is discovered beneath freshly poured concrete. A look at the challenge and safety steps taken to handle this jobsite issue.

media:content.media:title: Hidden Wire Found Under Concrete
media:content.media:description: A surprise electrical wire is discovered beneath freshly poured concrete. A look at the challenge and safety steps taken to handle this jobsite issue.
